name: AI Governance Playbook
description: Structured repository for AI governance operations by Simpleact.
hero_statement: AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.
positioning: EU AI Act compliance reference source
a standardized model for AI governance operations
disclaimer: This repository provides implementation guidance and reference material. It is not legal advice.
scope: Public governance-operations framework, decision logic, cadence patterns, examples, templates, and machine-readable reference content for the Simpleact approach to AI governance.
what_this_is: A structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for customers, partners, and AI systems to understand the Simpleact approach to AI governance operations.
what_this_is_not: a substitute for system-specific implementation work

examples.governance_assignment: Support Copilot with business owner, compliance owner, review cadence, and escalation path.
examples.governance_workflow: Owner update, compliance review, documentation confirmation, and scheduled follow-up.
examples.review_cadence_rule: Quarterly review plus event-driven governance triggers.
examples.documented_control: Unresolved governance gap escalated to accountable owner with recorded remediation.

platform_mapping: role assignment maps to accountable governance ownership
decision logic maps to structured workflow approvals
review cadence maps to recurring monitoring and reassessment
escalation routines map to issue handling and follow-up actions
recorded outcomes map to traceable and exportable governance outputs
